top3.sql:
SELECT t.team_long_name
FROM Team_Attributes ta
JOIN Team t ON ta.team_api_id = t.team_api_id
WHERE ta.buildUpPlayDribblingClass = 'Normal'
  AND ta.date LIKE '2014%'
  AND ta.chanceCreationPassing < (
    SELECT AVG(chanceCreationPassing)
    FROM Team_Attributes
    WHERE buildUpPlayDribblingClass = 'Normal'
      AND date LIKE '2014%'
  )
ORDER BY ta.chanceCreationPassing DESC;

SELECT t.team_long_name
FROM Team_Attributes ta
JOIN Team t ON ta.team_api_id = t.team_api_id
WHERE ta.buildUpPlayDribblingClass = 'Normal'
  AND ta.chanceCreationPassing < (
    SELECT AVG(chanceCreationPassing)
    FROM Team_Attributes
    WHERE buildUpPlayDribblingClass = 'Normal'
  )
  AND ta.date LIKE '2014%'
ORDER BY ta.chanceCreationPassing DESC;

SELECT t.team_long_name
FROM Team_Attributes ta
JOIN Team t ON ta.team_api_id = t.team_api_id
WHERE ta.buildUpPlayDribblingClass = 'Normal'
  AND ta.date LIKE '2014%'
  AND ta.chanceCreationPassing < (
    SELECT AVG(chanceCreationPassing)
    FROM Team_Attributes
    WHERE buildUpPlayDribblingClass = 'Normal'
      AND date LIKE '2014%'
  )
ORDER BY ta.chanceCreationPassing DESC;

WITH avg_passing_2014 AS (
  SELECT AVG(chanceCreationPassing) AS avg_chance_passing
  FROM Team_Attributes
  WHERE buildUpPlayDribblingClass = 'Normal'
    AND date LIKE '2014%'
)
SELECT t.team_long_name
FROM Team_Attributes ta
JOIN Team t ON ta.team_api_id = t.team_api_id
CROSS JOIN avg_passing_2014 ap
WHERE ta.buildUpPlayDribblingClass = 'Normal'
  AND ta.date LIKE '2014%'
  AND ta.chanceCreationPassing < ap.avg_chance_passing
ORDER BY ta.chanceCreationPassing DESC;

SELECT t.team_long_name
FROM Team_Attributes ta
JOIN Team t ON ta.team_api_id = t.team_api_id
WHERE ta.buildUpPlayDribblingClass = 'Normal'
  AND ta.chanceCreationPassing < (
    SELECT AVG(chanceCreationPassing)
    FROM Team_Attributes
    WHERE buildUpPlayDribblingClass = 'Normal'
  )
  AND ta.date LIKE '2014%'
ORDER BY ta.chanceCreationPassing DESC;

SELECT t.team_long_name
FROM Team_Attributes ta
JOIN Team t ON ta.team_api_id = t.team_api_id
WHERE ta.buildUpPlayDribblingClass = 'Normal'
  AND ta.date LIKE '2014%'
  AND ta.chanceCreationPassing < (
    SELECT AVG(chanceCreationPassing)
    FROM Team_Attributes
    WHERE buildUpPlayDribblingClass = 'Normal'
      AND date LIKE '2014%'
  )
ORDER BY ta.chanceCreationPassing DESC;

WITH avg_passing_2014 AS (
  SELECT AVG(chanceCreationPassing) AS avg_chance_passing
  FROM Team_Attributes
  WHERE buildUpPlayDribblingClass = 'Normal'
    AND date LIKE '2014%'
)
SELECT t.team_long_name
FROM Team_Attributes ta
JOIN Team t ON ta.team_api_id = t.team_api_id
CROSS JOIN avg_passing_2014 ap
WHERE ta.buildUpPlayDribblingClass = 'Normal'
  AND ta.date LIKE '2014%'
  AND ta.chanceCreationPassing < ap.avg_chance_passing
ORDER BY ta.chanceCreationPassing DESC;

SELECT t.team_long_name
FROM Team_Attributes ta
JOIN Team t ON ta.team_api_id = t.team_api_id
WHERE ta.buildUpPlayDribblingClass = 'Normal'
  AND ta.chanceCreationPassing < (
    SELECT AVG(chanceCreationPassing)
    FROM Team_Attributes
    WHERE buildUpPlayDribblingClass = 'Normal'
  )
  AND strftime('%Y', ta.date) = '2014'
ORDER BY ta.chanceCreationPassing DESC;

final.sql:
SELECT t.team_long_name
FROM Team_Attributes ta
JOIN Team t ON ta.team_api_id = t.team_api_id
WHERE ta.buildUpPlayDribblingClass = 'Normal'
  AND ta.date LIKE '2014%'
  AND ta.chanceCreationPassing < (
    SELECT AVG(chanceCreationPassing)
    FROM Team_Attributes
    WHERE buildUpPlayDribblingClass = 'Normal'
      AND date LIKE '2014%'
  )
ORDER BY ta.chanceCreationPassing DESC;
